name: property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, inefficient scheduling causes tenant complaints and potential loss of rental income. We automate maintenance scheduling instead of manual scheduling and tracking of maintenance tasks.
features: generate work orders for maintenance tasks
send reminders for upcoming maintenance tasks

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, inefficient scheduling causes tenant complaints and potential loss of rental income. We automate maintenance scheduling instead of manual scheduling and tracking of maintenance tasks.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual scheduling and tracking of maintenance tasks
must_have_features: generate work orders for maintenance tasks
send reminders for upcoming maintenance tasks

one_liner: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, inefficient scheduling causes tenant complaints and potential loss of rental income. We automate maintenance scheduling instead of manual scheduling and tracking of maintenance tasks.
